title: Clipboard
description: Rolling in-memory history of the last 20 clipboard entries in both directions — text copied out of a terminal and text pasted in — in a small app window where any entry re-copies with one click. Ships disabled (opt-in) because clipboards carry secrets; captures nothing until enabled. Ephemeral — a reload clears it, and a Clear-history button empties it on demand. Rides the core ctx.clipboard observer seam + ctx.registerWindowKind.
author: JohnConnorNPC
